//: Per-slug hero-image subjects for blog/scripts/hero_images.mjs. Each subject is ONE physical object metaphor (<=12 words, no screens/text/UI/two-object comparisons) rendered in the locked matte-clay house style. seedOffset (optional, default 0) bumps the deterministic seed to re-roll a single image reproducibly. Writers: pick metaphors NOT already in this file.
